docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,967.73 FILED BY PANASIA ADVERTISING AGENCY AS TO DEFENDANT PRINCE PALACE SEAFOOD RESTAURANT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-27-1992 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 00

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PANASIA ADVERTISING AGENCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRINCE PALACE SEAFOOD RESTAURANT $2,967.73 PRINCIPAL, $12.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,980.52 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
